Package com.destroystokyo.paper.event.brigadier

package com.destroystokyo.paper.event.brigadier
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AsyncPlayerSendCommandsEvent<S extends CommandSourceStack>
    Fired any time a Brigadier RootCommandNode is generated for a player to inform the client of commands.
    AsyncPlayerSendSuggestionsEvent
    Called when sending Suggestions to the client.
    CommandRegisteredEvent<S extends BukkitBrigadierCommandSource>
    Deprecated.
    For removal, use the new brigadier api.
